title: United States Selective Service Registration
description: Register an eligible individual with the U.S. Selective Service System, as required by law of most people assigned male at birth between the ages of 18 and 25 living in the United States. This document describes the eligibility window and the small fixed set of registrant inputs. It does not submit the registration; the live sss.gov source is always authoritative (see verification).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema authored from the official Selective Service online registration page. The eligibility window (most people assigned male at birth, ages 18 through 25) and the small registrant field set (name, date of birth, SSN, current mailing address, contact) were confirmed against the source; individual input fields reflect the form's structure but are not yet independently re-verified item-by-item. The age-eligibility window is a temporal rule v0.1 cannot encode and is recorded in field descriptions. Status remains 'draft'. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: lastName
fields.label: Last name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Your legal last name.

fields.name: firstName
fields.label: First name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: middleName
fields.label: Middle name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Date of birth
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Full date, YYYY-MM-DD. Registration is required for most people assigned male at birth from their 18th birthday until they turn 26; the online service accepts registrations from age 18 up to (but not including) age 26. This age window is a rule v0.1 cannot enforce as a constraint.
fields.sourceRef: Online registration — Date of Birth (eligibility 18 through 25)

fields.name: socialSecurityNumber
fields.label: Social Security number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Your 9-digit U.S. Social Security number. Those without an SSN must contact the Selective Service System to register by another method.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Current mailing address — street address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Your current mailing address.

fields.name: mailingAddressLine2
fields.label: Current mailing address — apartment, suite, or unit (optional)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: mailingAddressCity
fields.label: Current mailing address — city
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: mailingAddressState
fields.label: Current mailing address — state or territory
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Two-letter USPS state or territory abbreviation, e.g. CA, NY, TX.

fields.name: mailingAddressPostalCode
fields.label: Current mailing address — ZIP code
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. 5-digit or ZIP+4 format, e.g. 90210 or 90210-1234.

fields.name: email
fields.label: Email address
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. A valid email address; used to send a registration confirmation.

fields.name: phone
fields.label: Phone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format, e.g. +12025551234.
